name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for next-service-pages
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

Describe the agency or freelancer workflow this feature would improve. What pain point does it solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you would like to see. Be specific about API shape, file structure, or UX if relevant.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you have considered.

## Additional context

Links to similar patterns in other starter kits, client project examples, or mockups.

## Phase (optional)

Which roadmap phase does this belong to?

- [ ] Phase 1 — Scaffolding & config
- [ ] Phase 2 — UI components
- [ ] Phase 3 — AI & content automation
- [ ] Phase 4 — Booking integrations
